allow: Bash(node -e " let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const runs=JSON.parse\(d\).workflow_runs||[]; runs.forEach\(r=>console.log\('Run #'+r.run_number+': '+r.name+' | event: '+r.event+' | status: '+r.status+' | conclusion: '+\(r.conclusion||'pending'\)+' | branch: '+r.head_branch+' | '+r.created_at\)\); }\);")
